title: Feedback Button UI Patterns
description: Four interactive panels comparing minimal, labeled, follow-up, and emoji-scale patterns for collecting feedback on chatbot responses.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Compare four common feedback-button patterns and their trade-offs
Explain why follow-up questions yield the most actionable feedback

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Side-by-side live mockups with clickable state transitions
pedagogical.assessment: Students select and justify the best feedback pattern for a given scenario
